change.item: Aligned the Joomla update XML format with the JoomTheme package update structure.
Moved public update metadata to the updates directory for GitHub hosting.
Added SHA-256 checksum support to the generated update XML.
Reworked the extension metadata for international and JED usage.
Changed the manifest name and default English language strings to WoltLab Latest Topics.
Updated README, update XML and changelog XML to English.

fix.item: Removed remaining Turkish strings from the default English package identity.
Updated internal cache and user-agent version references.
Added GPL license headers to PHP files for JED Checker compliance.
Added update server and changelog URL information to the manifest file.

change.item: Switched to a GitHub release-based Joomla update server structure.

fix.item: Removed the external style.css loading call.

change.item: Changed the card-style topic layout to a simple list layout.
Used Bootstrap badges and the btn btn-light class for the button.
